nodes.title: Load Model (80G VRAM)
widgets_values:
import transformer_lens
import gc, torch

if 'model' in globals():
    del model  # the big one

gc.collect()
torch.cuda.empty_cache()
torch.cuda.ipc_collect()

# Load a model (eg GPT-2 Small)
model = transformer_lens.HookedTransformer.from_pretrained("Qwen/Qwen3-14B")
​Loaded pretrained model Qwen/Qwen3-14B into HookedTransformer

prompt = "That error means the working directory didn’t actually end up as /workspace/ComfyUI when Python ran (so it looked for main.py in /workspace). Easiest fix: cd inside the bash -lc command and don’t rely on docker exec -w (it should work, but this avoids any surprises)."
messages = [
    {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
]
text = model.tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
    messages,
    tokenize=False,
    add_generation_prompt=True,
    enable_thinking=True # Switches between thinking and non-thinking modes. Default is True.
)
model_inputs = model.tokenizer([text], return_tensors="pt").to(model.cfg.device)

# Run the model and get logits and activations
logits, activations = model.run_with_cache(model_inputs["input_ids"])
